title: Furnies
description: Furnies adds stylish and functional furniture to Minecraft, enhancing interior and exterior design.
body:
![KeyArt](https://i.imgur.com/C3kd7cR.jpeg)

Bring your builds to life with **Furnies**, a furniture mod designed to seamlessly integrate into your Minecraft world. Whether you're decorating a rustic cabin, a high-tech lab, or a bustling town square, **Furnies** provides beautifully crafted furniture pieces that enhance both aesthetics and functionality. Designed for versatility, **Furnies** blends effortlessly with both vanilla and modded environments, offering an immersive experience that expands your creative possibilities.

--- ## Features ✔ **Immersive, high-quality furniture** designed to fit naturally into Minecraft’s blocky aesthetic. ✔ **Future updates** planned for additional furniture styles, materials, and interactive elements. ✔ **Modular design** allowing builders to mix and match pieces for unique interiors. --- ## Credits A special thanks to **Starfish Studios**, the creators of **Another Furniture**, whose contributions to registry, table, and chair mechanics helped make this mod possible.
